# Italian Estate

> Independent research on Italy property investment for US, UK, and European buyers. Part of MORE Group cross-border real estate intelligence.

- Site: https://italian-estate.com
- Parent: https://moregroup.estate/
- Contact: info@italian-estate.com
- Corpus: 224+ guides, areas, comparisons, projects, developers, and news articles
- Markets: Milan, Rome, Tuscany, Piedmont, Liguria, Emilia-Romagna, Umbria, Marche, Abruzzo, Molise, Basilicata, Puglia, Sicily, Sardinia, Lake Como, Amalfi Coast
- Focus: foreign buyer due diligence, cadastral/conformità checks, STR licensing (CIN/SCIA), IMU and cedolare secca, flat tax regime, regional yield comparisons
- Not a developer, not a listing portal — editorial + shortlist consultation

## Collections
- /guides/ — legal, tax, regional investment hubs
- /areas/ — city and district guides
- /compare/ — city and region comparisons
- /projects/ — curated project reviews
- /developers/ — developer profiles
- /news/ — market data articles

## Full corpus
https://italian-estate.com/llms-full.txt
